compressed_prompt:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
<<resignation notice>> to boss: quitting job
response:
Here’s a professional and polite resignation email you can send to your boss:

---

**Subject:** <<Resignation Notice>>

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to formally resign from my position at [Company Name], with my last working day being [last working day, typically two weeks from the date of the email].

This decision was not an easy one, but after careful consideration, I have decided to move on to pursue [brief reason, e.g., "a new opportunity," "personal growth," or "a different career path"]. I am grateful for the opportunities I’ve had during my time here and for the support you and the team have provided.

Please let me know how I can assist in ensuring a smooth transition over the next two weeks. I’m happy to help train a replacement, document my responsibilities, or wrap up any pending tasks.

Thank you again for the experience and guidance. I’ve truly valued being part of [Company Name] and working under your leadership.

Best regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Job Title]
[Your Contact Information, if appropriate]

---
